name: contextlens
description: Visualize, gate, and trim Claude Code's context window in real time.

contextlens.proxyPort.description: Port the FastAPI proxy listens on.

contextlens.autoStartProxy.description: Spawn the FastAPI proxy automatically when the panel opens. Disable if you run the backend yourself.

contextlens.backendDir.description: Absolute path to the backend/ directory. Empty = auto-detect ('<workspace>/backend').

contextlens.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter used to run uvicorn. Empty = auto-detect 'backend/venv/bin/python', falling back to 'python3'.

contextlens.webviewDistDir.description: Absolute path to the built React app (frontend/dist). Empty = auto-detect ('<workspace>/frontend/dist').
